data.name: Summer Scent
data.detailed_description:
Jack is 18 years old and enjoying his summer break. While his parents are away for the week, he has little else to do except relax by the pool and keep an eye on the bane of his existence, the ever-misbehaving Eve.

It's a recipe for disaster unless Eve's best friend, the enticing and luscious Cassie, meddles in their unfinished business and coaxes them toward reconciliation. But she'll need to act fast. As their days of living under the same roof draw to a close, time is running out for Jack and Eve.

With a vicious and insidious new danger lurking at their periphery, Jack will need to grow up fast if he hopes to protect his friends, his loved ones... and maybe even his own life.

You play Jack. What path will you choose?

Summer Scent is a visual novel and character-driven story that your decisions will shape.

Through a combination of critical choices, you will influence the narrative and forge your own path. Your actions will have consequences, good or bad, pleasurable or nefarious, wholesome or destructive.

There are eighteen different routes and several variations for you to explore.
data.about_the_game:
Jack is 18 years old and enjoying his summer break. While his parents are away for the week, he has little else to do except relax by the pool and keep an eye on the bane of his existence, the ever-misbehaving Eve.

It's a recipe for disaster unless Eve's best friend, the enticing and luscious Cassie, meddles in their unfinished business and coaxes them toward reconciliation. But she'll need to act fast. As their days of living under the same roof draw to a close, time is running out for Jack and Eve.

With a vicious and insidious new danger lurking at their periphery, Jack will need to grow up fast if he hopes to protect his friends, his loved ones... and maybe even his own life.

You play Jack. What path will you choose?

Through a combination of critical choices, you will influence the narrative and forge your own path. Your actions will have consequences, good or bad, pleasurable or nefarious, wholesome or destructive.

There are eighteen different routes and several variations for you to explore.
data.short_description: You are Jack. Summer's here and you have the house to yourself... almost. Eve and her best friend Cassie are underfoot, sporting new bikinis, and eager to settle old business. It's hot outside. Temptation hangs heavy in the air. What will you do?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 or OpenGL ES 2 are required
